Sinangoe vs. Zabalo

Morgan Manning

2023-11-10

Sinangoe versus Zabalo

Timeframe

In Zabalo, camera trapping commenced on 2018-07-03 and ended on 2018-10-09, spanning 98 days. As for Sinangoe, trapping began on 2022-08-02 and ended on 2022-12-01, going for 121 days.


Consolidating time steps

The following plots show unconsolidated versus consolidated time steps for three species in Sinangoe and in Zabalo.

Diversity and richness

Species richness

Zabalo and Sinangoe had 30 and 38 total species, respectively, with Menhinick’s species richness indices of 1.127 and 0.696.


Diversity

Among Sinangoe stations, the Shannon Diversity Index ranged from 0.305 to 2.589. Among Zabalo stations, the Shannon Diversity Index ranged from 0 to 2.73. Among Siona stations, the Shannon Diversity Index ranged from 0 to 2.548. Among Siekopai stations, the Shannon Diversity Index ranged from 0.349 to 2.269.

Species Diversity
Community nIndiv nSpecies shannonIndex simpsonIndex
Siekopai 3201 44 2.232914 0.7679467
Sinangoe 2127 38 2.773124 0.9138674
Siona 762 35 2.529869 0.8475658
Zabalo 681 29 2.856870 0.9278184
